# @handamade/psi-mcp — MCP access to Psi (Ψ)

Two read-only tools over a baked index of the generated artifacts:
- search(query): briefs {id, kind, title, summary}; empty query = overview
- get(id): component (props/defaults/a11y doc) | token (formula + OKLCH/hex per theme) | topic (guidance) | pattern (compose tree, clarifying parameters, content, gaps/blocked status, preset JSX)
Ids: component:<Name>, token:<name>, topic:<key>, pattern:<id>; bare names resolve case-insensitively.

Connect: https://psi.kurkin.de/mcp (Streamable HTTP) or `npx @handamade/psi-mcp` (stdio).
Agent context: `npx @handamade/psi-mcp init [--claude]` writes a marker-delimited block into AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md (D44).
The index bakes packages/react/dist/{manifest.json,patterns.json} (patterns.json: 3 composition patterns with clarifying parameters, blocked/gaps flags, preset JSX) + packages/tokens/dist/{guidance.json,resolved/*.json} at publish; lockstep versioning keeps it truthful (D43).
